description.en: A rare deep-sea shark with pink skin and jaws that can snap forward to catch prey.
description.zh: 一种罕见的深海鲨鱼，拥有粉红色的皮肤和可以向前弹出捕捉猎物的下颚。

anatomy.en: They have a long, flattened snout filled with electrical sensors. Their jaws are highly elastic and can extend out of their mouth.
anatomy.zh: 它们长着扁平的长吻，上面布满了电感受器。它们的下颚极具弹性，可以弹出嘴外。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They live in the darkness of the deep ocean. When prey is near, they thrust their jaws out in a split second to grab it.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们生活在深海的黑暗中。当猎物靠近时，它们会在瞬间弹出下颚将其咬住。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Found globally in deep waters of the Atlantic, Pacific, and Indian Oceans, usually near continental slopes.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 全球分布于大西洋、太平洋和印度洋的深海中，通常靠近大陆坡。
